title: Anatomy of a NumPy Structured Array
description: A visual breakdown of the components and data structure of a NumPy Structured Array, showing how it organizes heterogeneous data types into a single array.
relationships: The Array Container holds a homogeneous block of memory (Data Buffer) which is interpreted through a structured data type. The data type defines multiple Field Names, each with its own Data Type (e.g., int32, float64, 'U10'). Individual Records are accessed by index, returning a tuple of values corresponding to each field.
